roa.docketEntryComment: PUB DEF MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE FILED TODAY

/DAWT/CAL:RESTITUTION DETERMINATION/DAWT/RESTO:NAZIR SAYED IN THE AMOUNT OF $6,788,12/RESTO:CURTIS SMITH IN THE AMOUNT OF $950,00/ /X:CR-115, CR-110& CR-111 FORMS FILED IN OPEN COURT/MO PC 1385:IN THE INTEREST OF JUSTICE/

/CAL:TO SET RESTITUTION HEARING/DAWT/X:THIS MATTER IS A DEJ AND NOT SENTENCED,  BECAUSE IT IS NEITHER A PROBATION OR A PRISON MATTER, THE MATTER ISBEING RETURNED TO THE  DEPARTMENT WHERE THE DEJ WAS AGREED UPON SO THAT THEASSISTANT DISTRICT ATTORNEY CAN WORK WITH VICTIM SERVICES TO DETERMINE IFANY VICTIM RESTITUTION IS OWED AND HANDLE THE MATTER IN SAID DEPARTMENT/CONTD:PEOPLE'S RESTITUTION DETERMINATION/DOPU:ATTORNEY HAS AUTHORITY/

/CAL:STATUS OF VICTIM RESTITUTION & DEJ/DAWT/X:THE PEOPLE WILL PRODUCE AVICTIM RESTITUTION REPORT BECAUSE THIS IS A DEJ/CONTD:TO SET RESTITUTION HEARING, RECEIPT OF VICTIM RESITUTION REPORT/DOPU:ATTORNEY HAS AUTHORITY/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/987,2/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/X: DEFENSE REQUESTSONGOING DISCOVERY/NTW/CAUSE1/LDPX: 01-11-21 (30TH)/ACM/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:TO SET RESTITUTION HEARING/DAWT/CONTD:CLARIFICATION OF VICTIM RESTITUTION & DEJ/DAWF/
/CAL:DEFERRED ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT STATUS/CONTD:TO SET RESTITUTION HEARING/DAWF/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING AND MOTION TO SUPPRESS/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DAWF/LD:01-11-21/
